findings.title: Loop completion still uses 'no open high findings' instead of 'no actionable findings'
findings.detail: Loop success path triggers when high-severity new/open = 0, but FR-006 defines post-loop state by all actionable findings. Medium/low findings remaining would incorrectly show '✅ Auto-fix complete'.
findings.suggested_resolution: Recompute post-loop actionable_count using status in {new, open} and choose loop_with_findings vs loop_no_findings from that count.

findings.title: Handoff options do not match exact FR-006 labels
findings.detail: Prompts use 'Approve & Commit'/'Reject' instead of 'Approve'/'中止'. Missing 'Auto-fix 続行' on loop-with-findings. FR-006 requires exact labels.
findings.suggested_resolution: Replace labels with exact FR-006 values: 'Approve', '手動修正', '中止', 'Auto-fix 続行'.

findings.title: Stale 'buttons only' instruction contradicts dual-display
findings.detail: Line 556 says 'Do NOT present next-action choices as text' which conflicts with the new Dual-Display Fallback Pattern.
findings.suggested_resolution: Remove or rewrite the stale instruction.

findings.title: No test coverage for new handoff/fallback behavior
findings.detail: No test or verification coverage for zero-findings review, loop states, dismiss/timeout fallback, or invalid text re-prompt.
findings.suggested_resolution: Add acceptance checklist exercising each FR-006 state and FR-002 fallback path.
